tools.name: start_research
tools.title: Start GPTResearcher Research
tools.description: Runs a GPT Researcher Python research task and returns the report, sources, costs, and collected context.

query.description: Research question to send to GPTResearcher.

moreContext.description: Optional extra context or instructions for GPTResearcher.

reportType.description: GPT Researcher report type. Defaults to research_report.
